information.description: AviGa™ HP70 is Avid Organics' gold-standard Glycolic Acid, engineered for the most demanding regulated industries. At its core is our proprietary synthesis technology, a precision-controlled process developed and refined entirely in-house over years of manufacturing excellence. This technology enables us to deliver industry-leading purity and an ultra-low impurity profile with a consistency that off-the-shelf sources simply cannot match. The result is a Glycolic Acid that formulators and manufacturers can trust, not just batch to batch, but across every market we serve globally.

information.description: AviGa™ Bio HP70 is Avid Organics' bio-based Glycolic Acid, engineered for brands and manufacturers who demand both performance and provenance. Derived from renewable feedstocks through our proprietary green synthesis process, it delivers the same industry-leading purity and ultra-low impurity profile as our gold-standard HP70 with the added benefit of a verified bio-based origin. For formulators navigating the growing demand for sustainable, traceable ingredients, AviGa™ Bio HP70 is the answer that doesn't ask you to compromise.

information.description:
Glycine is a foundational ingredient across multiple regulated industries. AviGly™ HP addresses this directly: a 98.5–101.5% assay and ultra-low impurity profile, verified against the major international pharmacopoeial standards.
Manufactured at a facility running on 100% renewable electricity, it also meets the sourcing criteria of strategic partners with active sustainability commitments.

information.description: AviVan™ is our premium Vanillin, engineered for consistent olfactory performance, thermal stability, and broad formulation compatibility across food, beverage, fragrance, and pharmaceutical applications. With purity exceeding 99.5% and a characteristic, true-vanilla sensory profile, AviVan™ delivers the reliability demanded by global flavor houses, fragrance manufacturers, and food producers. Our advanced synthesis and purification processes ensure batch-to-batch consistency and eliminate off-notes that compromise product quality.

information.description: Chlorhexidine Base is a high-purity antimicrobial intermediate engineered for pharmaceutical and industrial synthesis. This critical intermediate serves as the foundation for manufacturing Chlorhexidine salts (digluconate, diacetate, dihydrochloride) used extensively in healthcare antiseptics, oral care products, and pharmaceutical formulations. Our advanced manufacturing process delivers consistent purity, controlled particle size, and comprehensive regulatory documentation supporting downstream product registrations globally.

hero.subtitle: Advanced Intermediates for Pharmaceutical & Industrial Innovation

information.description: MEHQ (Monomethyl Ether Hydroquinone) is a high-performance polymerization inhibitor and stabilizer engineered for precise control of radical reactions in polymer production, monomer storage, and specialty chemical manufacturing. Our high-purity MEHQ (99%+ assay) delivers consistent inhibition performance, thermal stability, and compatibility across diverse polymer systems and chemical processes. This essential specialty chemical enables safe handling and storage of reactive monomers while optimizing polymerization control in commercial production.
